endpoints.name: For the specified subscription, gets the Auto Quota Increase enrollment status.
endpoints.description: Gets the Auto Quota Increase enrollment details for the specified subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: For the specified subscription, sets the Auto Quota Increase enrollment properties.
endpoints.description: Sets the Auto Quota Increase enrollment properties for the specified subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Gets the current quota limit and usages for all the resources by the resource provider at the specified location.
endpoints.description: This API gets the current quota limits and usages for the resource provider for the specified location. This response can be used to submit quotaRequests.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PROVIDERID}} with a real providerid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Gets the current quota limit and usages for the resource provider for the specified location for the specific resource in the parameter.
endpoints.description: This API gets the current quota limit and usages for the specific resource for resource provider for the specified location. This response can be used to submit quotaRequests.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PROVIDERID}} with a real providerid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename.

endpoints.name: Submits a Quota Request for a resource provider at the specified location for the specific resource in the parameter.
endpoints.description: Submits Quota change request for a resource provider for the specified location for the specific resource in the parameter. To use, first make a Get request to get quota information. This information consists of a list of resources and information regarding those resources. For all the resources in that list which require an update to their quotas, update their limit fields in the response from the Get request to their new values. Then, submit this updated JSON object to this quota request API. This will update the quota to the values specified. The location header in the response will be used to track the status of the quota request. Please check the provisioningState field in the response.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PROVIDERID}} with a real providerid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename.

endpoints.name: Submits a Quota Request for a resource provider at the specified location for the specific resource in the parameter.
endpoints.description: Submits Quota change request for a resource provider for the specified location for the specific resource in the parameter. To use, first make a Get request to get quota information. This information consists of a list of resources and information regarding those resources. For all the resources in that list which require an update to their quotas, update their limit fields in the response from the Get request to their new values. Then, submit this updated JSON object to this quota request API. This will update the quota to the values specified. The location header in the response will be used to track the status of the quota request. Please check the provisioningState field in the response.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PROVIDERID}} with a real providerid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename.

endpoints.name:
For the specified location and resource Provider, gets the quota requests under the subscription over the time
 period of one year ago from now to one year back, based on the filter specified.
endpoints.description: For the specified location and Resource provider gets the current quota requests under the subscription over the time period of one year ago from now to one year back. oData filter can be used to select quota requests.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PROVIDERID}} with a real providerid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Gets the Quota request status by requestId, for the specified resource provider at specified location.
endpoints.description: Gets the QuotaRequest details and status by the quota requestId for the resources for the resource provider at a specific location. The requestId is returned as response to the Put requests for serviceLimits.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{PROVIDERID}} with a real providerid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.
